name: Cochlear Limited
analysis: COH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 64% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$112.6900, stop A$92.6739, target A$179.7800 (3.35:1) — then trail it.
